title: sookoothaii/IntelShed
summary: Spatial intelligence workstation — OSINT feeds, fusion analytics, local and cloud AI briefing, optional Pi edge sync

title: janderswag/legal-document-chat
summary: Self-hosted, privacy-first document chat for attorneys: parse legal PDFs and query them with local open-source LLMs (Ollama) + verifiable page citations.

title: monolabsdev/poly-ui
summary: A lightweight, high-performance AI desktop application designed to be completely local

title: araray/llmcore
summary: A unified, async Python framework for LLM applications—chat, autonomous agents, RAG, and sandboxed code execution. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, and more through a single API. Features an 8-phase cognitive reasoning cycle, Docker-based isolation, human-in-the-loop approvals, session management, and comprehensive observability.

title: rudi193-cmd/willow-2.0
summary: Willow 2.0 — local-first memory, MCP tools, and fleet coordination for AI agents. Postgres KB, Ollama default, Grove LAN remote.

title: lancekrogers/samantha
summary: Low-latency voice assistant for AI coding

title: alexvilelabah/bah-browser
summary: Bah - an AI browser (Perplexity Comet-style) by VilelaLab. Type plain-language commands and the agent clicks and types for you. Works free out of the box, or use your own key (DeepSeek/Mistral/NVIDIA) or a local model (Ollama). Electron + React + TypeScript.

title: shreyasks094/Zeus
summary: Local-first AI agent orchestrator with a web + mobile UI. Multi-provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Groq, Gemini, OpenRouter, Bedrock) or local models via Ollama; agents, sub-agents, skills, MCP, a vision-driven browser, workflows, and Tailscale access — all in ~/.zeus.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: Malchambar/text-to-instructor
summary: Turn the training page open in your browser into an engaging, spoken mini-lecture with diagrams shown in sync. Local-first study aid for diagram-heavy technical learning (Cisco/CCNA/security). Alpha.

title: wildlux/Prismalux
summary: Piattaforma AI locale in C ++ Qt6. multi-agente, locale 0-Token. llama.cpp ollama. Zero cloud, zero abbonamenti.

title: ymm-oss/tracefield
summary: Governable exploration for multi-agent systems: a research harness for semi-soluble orchestration that keeps the downstream influence of every input traceable, isolable, and retractable.

title: devops-thiago/ThrillhouseBot
summary: Your nerdy PR reviewer — a Quarkus GraalVM-native GitHub App that AI-reviews diffs, posts inline suggestions, and streams live to a dashboard.

title: konjoai/squish
summary: ⚡️ The fastest way to run local LLMs on Apple Silicon — sub-second model loads, beats Ollama on throughput, tail latency, and full-response time. OpenAI/Ollama-compatible. No cloud, no API keys.

title: RomeoCavazza/nvim-config
summary: Lua-based Neovim configuration with LSP, UI, Git, and AI tooling

title: RomeoCavazza/emacs-config
summary: Doom Emacs configuration with Evil, Org, LSP, Magit, and AI tooling

title: earlvanze/sage-router
summary: Local-first AI model router for serious agents. One endpoint for OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM, and authorized provider fallback.

title: wesleysimplicio/simplicio-loop-marketing
summary: Provider-agnostic AI marketing engine. CLI that drops into any host project. Pipeline: brief -> script -> creative -> caption -> compliance -> publish -> metrics -> ads. Switch LLM/image/video provider via env, never via skill rewrite.

title: mezmo/aura
summary: AURA is an agentic harness that turns an LLM model into a reliable, autonomous service capable of executing real SRE work. AURA provides the guardrails, API servers, state management, authentication, streaming, error handling, and tool integrations necessary to run AI SRE agents safely in production.

title: jazz1x/ohmyboring
summary: Self-hosted personal memory RAG. Distills Claude Code sessions into a local, human-readable wiki and recalls on demand. Engine in Rust, hooks in Python, runs on Ollama. Zero cloud.
